name: RunPod
one_liner: A globally distributed GPU cloud platform that enables developers to train, fine-tune, and deploy custom AI applications via on-demand GPU instances, serverless endpoints, and multi-node clusters.

ambiguities: Total raised reported as $20M by PitchBook/press release vs $22M by Tracxn (the $2M difference likely reflects an earlier grant/prize round from AI Grant); $20M Seed officially announced May 2024 but Tracxn dates it Nov 2023 — official Intel Capital press release uses May 8, 2024 as the announcement date.
HQ listed as Moorestown/Mount Laurel, NJ across most sources; Crunchbase lists Mount Laurel, NJ specifically; company press release says 'Mt. Laurel, New Jersey'.
Headcount varies across sources: PitchBook shows 82 (as of 2025), Tracxn shows 93 (Mar 2026), Growjo shows 131% YoY growth — all treated as estimates.
Series A reportedly in negotiation as of Jan 2026 per CryptoRank; no confirmed close found.
